flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Otero College rose 26% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.1k → $10.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Otero College fell 24% between 2006 and 2009 (48.1% → 36.7%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Otero College fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (754 → 619).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Otero College fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (50.8% → 43.7%).
